heading: Establishment of trout hatchery at Pittsford, Vermont
label: 760–4 Establishment of trout hatchery at Pittsford, Vermont
text: The Secretary of the Interior shall develop, reconstruct, equip, operate, and maintain the Federal fish hatchery, known as the Holden trout hatchery, at Pittsford, Vermont, in accordance with the program established by the Fish and Wildlife Service, Department of the Interior, for the improvement of such hatchery.
notes: Change of Name, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–8, div. E, title I, § 116123 Stat. 724Mar. 11, 2009“The Pittsford National Fish Hatchery in Chittenden, Vermont is hereby renamed the Dwight D. Eisenhower National Fish Hatchery.”
AppropriationsSection 2 of act , authorized the appropriation of $220,000 to carry out the provisions of this section.Aug. 1, 1956
